title: News | Recognition
text:
Copyright 2024 by Forsyth County, Georgia
Three County departments were recognized for excellence at a Forsyth County Board of Commissioners meeting on Thursday, Nov. 21. Read more...
At a June 20 meeting, the Forsyth County Board of Commissioners recognized the accomplishments of Brooke Anderson who recently earned the Girl Scout Gold Award, the highest achievement a Girl Scout can earn. Read more...
The Department of Building & Licensing was recognized by the Board of Commissioners for winning the 2024 Jurisdiction of the Year award from the Building Officials Association of Georgia. Read more...
The winners of the 2024 Storm Drain Art Contest were recognized at a Forsyth County Board of Commissioners regular meeting on Thursday, May 16. Read more...
The Association County Commissioners of Georgia (ACCG) honored Forsyth County District 4 Commissioner Cindy Jones Mills with an ACCG Cornerstone Award. Commissioner Mills also was reappointed and sworn in to serve as one of four National Association of Counties (NaCo) representatives for the 2024-2025 ACCG Board of Managers. Read more...
The Forsyth County Board of Commissioners recognized the accomplishments of Matthew Van Velsor, who recently earned the Eagle Scout rank. Read more...
The Forsyth County Department of Water & Sewer was recognized by the Board of Commissioners for winning multiple prestigious awards from the Georgia Association of Water Professionals (GAWP) for its excellent service. Read more...
The 2023-2024 North Forsyth High School Lady Raiders basketball team was recognized by the Board of Commissioners on March 21 for their historic season and hard work positively representing their school and the Forsyth County community. Read more...
At a Feb. 15 meeting, the Forsyth County Board of Commissioners recognized the accomplishments of Allison Conklin and Thomas Durand, who both recently earned the Eagle Scout rank, the highest ranking attainable in the Boy Scouts of America program. Read more...
Forsyth County’s Department of Geographic Information Services (GIS) won the ESRI 2023 Special Achievement in GIS, SAG Award on July 11 and was recognized by members of ESRI for its outstanding achievements. Read more...
